title: orobanche ramosa var. schweinfurthii
intro: Orobanche ramosa var. schweinfurthii is a parasitic plant species belonging to the broomrape family (Orobanchaceae), characterized by its branching stems and small, greenish-yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. It is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues, among others. In herbal preparations, Orobanche ramosa var. schweinfurthii is often used in combination with other medicinal plants, and its extracts can be found in traditional remedies, teas, and infusions.
